name: wecom
description: WeCom bot-first channel with bot WebSocket sessions plus optional self-built app fallback for proactive send and callback inbound

auth.instructions: Create a WeCom intelligent bot and collect Bot ID and Bot Secret for the primary websocket session path. Optionally configure a self-built app with Corp ID, Corp Secret, Agent ID, callback Token, and callback EncodingAESKey for Agent API fallback and callback inbound.
auth.token_hint: Bot ID/Secret come from WeCom bot setup; Corp ID looks like wwxxxx..., Agent ID is numeric, callback EncodingAESKey is 43 characters

required_secrets.name: wecom_corp_id
required_secrets.prompt: Enter your WeCom Corp ID (optional app fallback, for example wwxxxx...)

required_secrets.name: wecom_corp_secret
required_secrets.prompt: Enter your WeCom self-built app Corp Secret (optional app fallback)

required_secrets.name: wecom_agent_id
required_secrets.prompt: Enter your WeCom Agent ID (optional app fallback, numeric)

required_secrets.name: wecom_callback_token
required_secrets.prompt: Enter your WeCom callback Token (optional callback inbound)

required_secrets.name: wecom_callback_encoding_aes_key
required_secrets.prompt: Enter your WeCom callback EncodingAESKey (optional callback inbound, 43 chars)
